steps.title: Spot the causal signal
steps.content: The sentence after the underline says the temperature reductions “inspired an air‑cooling device,” showing that the finding leads to a practical application.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C correctly says the underlined portion establishes a finding central to the text’s discussion of a practical application resulting from the team’s study of fungal thermal biology.
The other three either describe the underlined bit as evidence for an earlier claim, as an observation that motivated the study, or as a tangential detail the later experiment was meant to explain, none of which matches the signal that the reductions inspired a device.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
